text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanetannhauser has just completed her full
training regimen, when...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Hey, Trainer! I want to run for a bit longer today!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Fuku told me that my lucky item today is the
moon!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I think I might get some kind of amazing power if
I run at night! This is my big chance to go beyond
my ordinary self!
choice_data_list: Get out there and shoot for the moon!

Sorry, but you'll end up working yourself too
hard.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Okay! Get ready to see my moonlight powerup!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Up, up, and away I go! Ei, ei, mun! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanetannhauser happily continues running
well into the night.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Hrm... But if the power comes from moonlight...
choice_data_list: Wouldn't just looking at the moon be enough?
Wouldn't just looking at the moon be enough?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Oh, now that you mention it, she never said I had
to run.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
In that case, I'll just gaze at the moon from my
room tonight until I'm full of power!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With that decided, Matikanetannhauser returns
to her dorm.
